data.title: Mein Street® Asian Eats wins Branding Award at 62nd GDUSA Design Awards™ in Lacey, Wash., 2026.
data.description: In Lacey, Washington, a quick-serve restaurant known as Mein Street® under the brand Real Fresh Brands™ has recently received the prestigious honor of winning the 62nd GDUSA Design Awards™. This Asian-inspired QSR brand was recognized specifically in the Branding + Identity Programs category for its outstanding brand design. Mein Street® stands out among the competition in this area and its excellence has been acknowledged through this esteemed award.

data.title: Dripos rebrands with 'Counter Talk' publication, solidifying as the OS for cafes. Announced Jan. 28, 2026. #coffee #tech
data.description: In New York on January 28, 2026, Dripos, a platform tailored for independent coffee shops, unveiled a complete rebranding effort, showcasing a fresh visual identity and introducing Counter Talk, a new industry publication. This move marks a significant step forward for the company as it aims to enhance its offerings for small coffee businesses.

data.title: PROG Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:PRG) to announce Q4 2025 financial results on Feb 18, 2026. Live webcast at 8:30 AM ET.
data.description: PROG Holdings, Inc. will announce its financial results for Q4 2025 on February 18, 2026, before the market opens. This fintech holding company for Progressive Leasing, Purchasing Power, Four Technologies, and Build is listed on NYSE as PRG. A live webcast to discuss the results will take place on February 18, 2026, at 8:30 A.M. ET. The link to access the webcast will be made available closer to the date. Stay tuned for more details.

data.title: Luxury all-electric townhome community opens in Milpitas, CA with modern designs and convenience.
data.description: A new luxury townhome community consisting of all-electric homes is now available, showcasing modern designs and unparalleled convenience. The community development boasts state-of-the-art features and amenities, with each townhome incorporating innovative technology and stylish finishes. The townhomes offer a blend of sophistication and comfort, catering to individuals seeking a contemporary and eco-friendly lifestyle. With a total of [number] units, the community aims to provide residents with a high-end living experience coupled with sustainable living practices.

data.title: WisdomTree offers $116B asset manager's tokenized funds on Solana (SOL), enabling access to money market, equity, and fixed income products.
data.description: WisdomTree has introduced a comprehensive range of regulated tokenized funds on Solana (SOL) platform, enabling institutional and retail investors to access money market, equity, and fixed income products directly on-chain. This initiative brings a diverse selection of investment opportunities to users, with the added benefit of utilizing Solana's efficient blockchain network. This move signifies the growing trend of traditional financial institutions embracing blockchain technology, with a focus on enhancing accessibility and transparency. Participants can now leverage this offering to engage in various sectors and capitalize on market opportunities while benefiting from the security and efficiency of decentralized finance.

data.title: General Motors reports Q4 EPS of $2.51 (+30.4% YoY), misses sales at $45.287B. Predicts adjusted earnings of $9.75-$10.50 for FY26, below Wall St. expectations of $11.73. RBC Capital raises price forecast from $92 to $107, citing reasons.
data.description: Car manufacturer General Motors (NYSE: GM) released its fourth-quarter financial results, surpassing expectations with adjusted earnings per share of $2.51, a 30.4% increase from the previous year. Despite beating the analyst consensus estimate of $2.20, the company fell short on sales, reporting $45.287 billion compared to the expected $45.804 billion. General Motors has projected adjusted earnings of $9.75 to $10.50 per share for fiscal 2026, which is lower than the Wall Street forecast of $11.73. RBC Capital analyst Tom Narayan revised the price target from $92 to $107, with an Outperform rating. The analyst anticipates challenges such as commodity costs and onshoring pressures to be partially balanced by regulatory advantages, warranty enhancements, reduced losses in electric vehicles, and decreased tariffs from USMCA.
